name: MARTEN TRANSPORT LTD
summary: Marten Transport, Ltd. is a temperature-sensitive and dry truckload carrier specializing in transporting food and consumer packaged goods requiring temperature-controlled or insulated environments. Operating five business platforms—Truckload, Dedicated, Brokerage, MRTN de Mexico, and formerly Intermodal—the company generated $883.7 million in 2025 operating revenue. It operates throughout the United States and parts of Mexico and Canada with a fleet of 2,654 company and independent contractor tractors.

products.name: Truckload
products.description: Regional short-haul and medium-to-long-haul full-load temperature-controlled and dry freight transportation across the US and into Mexico and Canada.

products.name: Dedicated
products.description: Customized transportation solutions using temperature-controlled trailers, dry vans, and specialized equipment within the United States under multi-year contracts.

products.name: Brokerage
products.description: Arranges third-party carriers for freight in temperature-controlled and dry vans within the US and into Mexico via Marten Transport Logistics, LLC.

products.name: MRTN de Mexico
products.description: Door-to-door service between the United States and Mexico using Mexican partner carriers, reported within Truckload and Brokerage segments.

products.name: Intermodal
products.description: Transported freight using refrigerated containers on railroad flatcars; operations sold effective September 30, 2025.

partnerships.description: MRTN de Mexico partners with Mexican carriers to provide door-to-door service between the United States and Mexico.
